headline: Rate Hikes & Acquisitions Drive AWK's Growth Despite Regulatory Risks
summary: American Water's growth is supported by new rates, acquisitions, merger plans and major capital investments, though regulation and aging infrastructure pose risks.

raw.headline: Rate Hikes & Acquisitions Drive AWK's Growth Despite Regulatory Risks

headline: Alper Yegin, CEO of the LoRa Alliance®, and IoT Technology Leaders to Discuss How LoRaWAN® Connectivity Is Enabling Smart Water Management
summary: WASHINGTON, June 17, 2026--Alper Yegin, CEO of the LoRa Alliance, will present an educational session – LoRaWAN in Action: Transforming Smart Water Management Across North America – at the American Water Works Association Annual Conference & Expo 2026 in Washington, D.C. on June 24, 2026. Additional panelists include representatives from Semtech, Zenner USA, Netmore and TEKTELIC.

headline: VODA.ai Launches AI-Powered Revenue Recovery Solution to Help Water Utilities Capture Revenue Hidden in Degrading Meters
summary: VODA.ai, an AI-powered decision support software for water utilities, today announced the launch of VODA.ai Meters, a new revenue recovery solution that helps water utilities identify meters most likely to be under-registering consumption and prioritize action based on volume and revenue at risk.
